//===== rAthena Script =======================================
//= Global Zeny & Costume Drop System
//===== Description: =========================================
//= On kill of ANY monster:
//= 1. 0.01% chance to drop a random costume.
//=    (Automatically parsed from item_db_equip.yml)
//= 2. Random Zeny reward (100 ~ 10000000).
//============================================================

-	script	GlobalDropSystem	-1,{
	end;

	OnNPCKillEvent:
		// 1. Costume Drop (0.01% chance -> 1 in 10000)
		if (rand(1, 100) == 1) {
			.@idx = rand(getarraysize(.CostumeIDs));
			.@item = .CostumeIDs[.@idx];
			getitem .@item, 1;
			dispbottom "Wow! You found a rare costume: [" + getitemname(.@item) + "]!";
			specialeffect2 EF_MOONSTAR;
		}

		// 2. Zeny Drop
		.@zeny = rand(1, 1000000);
		Zeny += .@zeny;
		dispbottom "You received " + .@zeny + " Zeny for hunting a monster!";
		end;

	OnInit:
		setarray .CostumeIDs[0], 5909, 5912, 5914, 5915, 5979, 5980, 5981, 15836, 15840, 15841, 15842, 15843, 15846, 15847, 15851, 15858, 15875, 15877, 15881, 15882, 15888, 15889, 15905, 15925, 15953, 15954, 18740, 18741, 18742, 18743, 18744, 19158, 19287, 19288, 19289, 19290, 19291, 19292, 19294, 19424, 19459, 19464, 19466, 19472, 19500, 19501, 19502, 19503, 19504, 19505, 19506, 19507, 19508, 19509, 19510, 19511, 19512, 19513, 19514, 19515, 19516, 19517, 19518, 19519, 19520, 19521, 19522, 19523, 19524, 19525, 19526, 19527, 19528, 19529, 19530, 19531, 19532, 19533, 19534, 19535, 19536, 19537, 19538, 19539, 19540, 19541, 19542, 19543, 19544, 19545, 19546, 19547, 19548, 19549, 19550, 19551, 19552, 19553, 19554, 19555;
		setarray .CostumeIDs[100], 19556, 19557, 19558, 19559, 19560, 19561, 19562, 19563, 19564, 19565, 19566, 19567, 19568, 19569, 19570, 19571, 19572, 19573, 19574, 19575, 19576, 19577, 19578, 19579, 19580, 19581, 19584, 19585, 19586, 19587, 19589, 19590, 19592, 19595, 19598, 19599, 19600, 19601, 19602, 19603, 19604, 19605, 19606, 19607, 19608, 19612, 19613, 19617, 19618, 19621, 19624, 19625, 19627, 19629, 19630, 19632, 19633, 19634, 19635, 19636, 19637, 19638, 19639, 19642, 19643, 19646, 19647, 19649, 19650, 19651, 19653, 19654, 19655, 19656, 19657, 19659, 19661, 19663, 19664, 19665, 19667, 19668, 19672, 19673, 19674, 19675, 19676, 19677, 19678, 19682, 19683, 19684, 19685, 19686, 19687, 19689, 19690, 19691, 19694, 19695;
		setarray .CostumeIDs[200], 19696, 19697, 19698, 19699, 19701, 19702, 19703, 19704, 19705, 19706, 19707, 19708, 19709, 19710, 19712, 19713, 19715, 19716, 19718, 19719, 19721, 19722, 19723, 19724, 19728, 19729, 19730, 19731, 19732, 19733, 19734, 19735, 19736, 19737, 19738, 19739, 19740, 19742, 19745, 19746, 19748, 19750, 19751, 19752, 19753, 19755, 19758, 19759, 19760, 19761, 19762, 19763, 19764, 19765, 19766, 19767, 19768, 19771, 19772, 19775, 19777, 19778, 19779, 19780, 19781, 19782, 19783, 19784, 19785, 19786, 19787, 19789, 19790, 19791, 19792, 19793, 19794, 19795, 19796, 19797, 19798, 19799, 19800, 19802, 19803, 19804, 19806, 19807, 19809, 19810, 19812, 19813, 19814, 19815, 19816, 19817, 19818, 19821, 19823, 19824;
		setarray .CostumeIDs[300], 19825, 19826, 19827, 19828, 19829, 19830, 19831, 19832, 19833, 19835, 19836, 19839, 19841, 19842, 19843, 19844, 19845, 19846, 19847, 19848, 19849, 19850, 19851, 19852, 19853, 19855, 19856, 19857, 19858, 19859, 19860, 19861, 19862, 19863, 19864, 19865, 19866, 19867, 19868, 19869, 19871, 19873, 19874, 19875, 19876, 19877, 19878, 19881, 19882, 19883, 19884, 19885, 19886, 19887, 19888, 19889, 19894, 19895, 19902, 19903, 19904, 19905, 19909, 19910, 19911, 19912, 19913, 19914, 19915, 19916, 19917, 19918, 19919, 19920, 19921, 19922, 19923, 19924, 19925, 19926, 19927, 19928, 19929, 19930, 19931, 19932, 19934, 19935, 19936, 19937, 19938, 19939, 19941, 19943, 19944, 19947, 19948, 19951, 19953, 19954;
		setarray .CostumeIDs[400], 19955, 19957, 19959, 19960, 19961, 19962, 19963, 19964, 19965, 19966, 19967, 19968, 19969, 19970, 19971, 19972, 19973, 19974, 19976, 19977, 19978, 19979, 19980, 19981, 19982, 19983, 19984, 19985, 19988, 19989, 19990, 19991, 19992, 19993, 19995, 19996, 19997, 19998, 19999, 20000, 20001, 20002, 20003, 20004, 20005, 20008, 20009, 20010, 20011, 20012, 20014, 20015, 20016, 20017, 20018, 20019, 20021, 20022, 20025, 20026, 20027, 20028, 20031, 20032, 20033, 20034, 20036, 20037, 20043, 20045, 20046, 20047, 20048, 20049, 20050, 20052, 20053, 20054, 20055, 20056, 20057, 20058, 20062, 20063, 20064, 20065, 20067, 20068, 20069, 20070, 20071, 20073, 20074, 20075, 20076, 20079, 20084, 20085, 20086, 20087;
		setarray .CostumeIDs[500], 20088, 20089, 20090, 20091, 20092, 20093, 20094, 20095, 20096, 20097, 20098, 20099, 20100, 20101, 20105, 20106, 20107, 20108, 20110, 20111, 20112, 20113, 20114, 20115, 20116, 20117, 20118, 20119, 20120, 20121, 20122, 20124, 20125, 20128, 20130, 20132, 20133, 20134, 20135, 20136, 20137, 20138, 20139, 20140, 20142, 20144, 20145, 20146, 20147, 20148, 20149, 20150, 20151, 20152, 20153, 20154, 20155, 20156, 20157, 20158, 20159, 20160, 20161, 20162, 20163, 20164, 20166, 20167, 20168, 20169, 20170, 20171, 20172, 20173, 20174, 20175, 20176, 20177, 20178, 20179, 20180, 20181, 20182, 20183, 20184, 20186, 20190, 20191, 20192, 20193, 20195, 20196, 20197, 20198, 20199, 20200, 20201, 20202, 20203, 20204;
		setarray .CostumeIDs[600], 20205, 20206, 20207, 20208, 20209, 20210, 20211, 20212, 20214, 20215, 20217, 20218, 20219, 20220, 20221, 20222, 20223, 20224, 20225, 20226, 20227, 20228, 20230, 20231, 20232, 20233, 20234, 20235, 20236, 20237, 20238, 20239, 20240, 20241, 20242, 20243, 20244, 20246, 20247, 20248, 20249, 20250, 20251, 20252, 20253, 20254, 20255, 20256, 20257, 20258, 20259, 20262, 20263, 20264, 20265, 20266, 20267, 20268, 20269, 20270, 20271, 20272, 20273, 20277, 20278, 20279, 20280, 20281, 20283, 20284, 20285, 20286, 20287, 20288, 20289, 20290, 20293, 20294, 20295, 20296, 20298, 20299, 20300, 20302, 20304, 20305, 20306, 20311, 20315, 20316, 20317, 20318, 20319, 20321, 20324, 20325, 20326, 20327, 20328, 20329;

		setarray .CostumeIDs[800], 20458, 20459, 20460, 20462, 20463, 20464, 20466, 20467, 20468, 20470, 20472, 20475, 20481, 20482, 20483, 20484, 20486, 20487, 20488, 20489, 20490, 20491, 20492, 20493, 20495, 20496, 20497, 20498, 20499, 20501, 20502, 20504, 20505, 20506, 20507, 20508, 20509, 20510, 20511, 20513, 20514, 20515, 20516, 20517, 20518, 20519, 20521, 20522, 20523, 20524, 20525, 20526, 20527, 20528, 20529, 20530, 20531, 20533, 20535, 20537, 20538, 20539, 20540, 20541, 20542, 20543, 20544, 20545, 20546, 20547, 20548, 20570, 20571, 20572, 20574, 20575, 20576, 20577, 20578, 20579, 20581, 20582, 20584, 20585, 20586, 20587, 20588, 20589, 20590, 20591, 20592, 20593, 20594, 20595, 20596, 20597, 20598, 20599, 20602, 20603;
		setarray .CostumeIDs[900], 20604, 20605, 20607, 20612, 20613, 20614, 20615, 20616, 20618, 20619, 20621, 20625, 20626, 20627, 20628, 20629, 20727, 20737, 20746, 20761, 20762, 20764, 20765, 20798, 20988, 20989, 20990, 20992, 21200, 21202, 21206, 21207, 21300, 21400, 31027, 31028, 31029, 31030, 31031, 31032, 31033, 31036, 31040, 31042, 31045, 31046, 31047, 31048, 31051, 31052, 31053, 31055, 31056, 31057, 31058, 31059, 31060, 31061, 31062, 31063, 31064, 31065, 31066, 31067, 31068, 31069, 31070, 31071, 31072, 31073, 31074, 31075, 31076, 31077, 31078, 31079, 31080, 31081, 31082, 31083, 31084, 31085, 31086, 31087, 31088, 31089, 31090, 31092, 31093, 31105, 31117, 31118, 31120, 31121, 31122, 31123, 31124, 31125, 31126, 31127;

		setarray .CostumeIDs[2300], 480487, 480492, 480493, 480494, 480501, 480503, 480505, 480506, 480507, 480508, 480517, 480521, 480523, 480556, 480565, 480566, 480595, 480596, 480611, 480616, 480617, 480618, 480627, 480629, 480631, 480632, 490242;
		end;
}
